_comment: SHA-256 checksums per golden PNG. Committed — lets reviewers detect uncommitted local golden churn. Goldens themselves are gitignored.

hud-bar.png.note: Golden not yet captured — run `npm run unity:visual-diff -- --panel hud-bar --capture` at full city load to populate. Null sha256 means capture pending.

main-menu.png.note: Golden not yet captured — run `npm run unity:visual-diff -- --panel main-menu --capture` at MainMenu scene load to populate. Null sha256 means capture pending.

new-game-form.png.note: Golden not yet captured — run `npm run unity:visual-diff -- --panel new-game-form --capture` at MainMenu scene load to populate. Null sha256 means capture pending.

save-load-view.png.note: Golden not yet captured — run `npm run unity:visual-diff -- --panel save-load-view --capture` at MainMenu scene load to populate. Null sha256 means capture pending.

settings-view.png.note: Golden not yet captured — run `npm run unity:visual-diff -- --panel settings-view --capture` at MainMenu scene load to populate. Null sha256 means capture pending.
